compiled_state.description:
## Story
f9d9-343d — Create scope-drift-reviewer agent definition

## testing_mode
GREEN

## Objective
Implement the scope-drift-reviewer agent definition file so that all 6 structural tests from Task A pass (turn GREEN).

## File to Create
plugins/dso/agents/scope-drift-reviewer.md

## Required Sections (in order)

### YAML Frontmatter
name: dso:scope-drift-reviewer
model: sonnet
description: Post-fix scope-drift classifier; receives ticket text + root_cause_report + git diff; emits GATE_SIGNAL with optional drift_classification extension

### Dispatch Parameters
Document the 3 inputs the agent receives:
- ticket_text: the original bug ticket description and acceptance criteria
- root_cause_report: the investigation findings from fix-bug Step 4
- git_diff: the staged diff to be reviewed

### PARSED_SCOPE Checkpoint (HARD ORDERING CONSTRAINT)
This section MUST appear before any root_cause_report processing instructions.
Include the exact constraint text:
  'Do NOT read root_cause_report before PARSED_SCOPE block is complete'
The checkpoint instructs the agent to extract ticket scope into a PARSED_SCOPE block first, then validate root_cause_report against it.

### Behavioral vs Non-Behavioral Heuristic Table
A table with two columns — 'Behavioral (scope)' and 'Non-Behavioral (not scope)' — listing at least 3 examples per column.
Examples: behavioral = observable output change, state transition, API contract change; non-behavioral = variable rename, comment edit, test-helper refactor.

### scope_insufficient Guard
If the ticket_text is too vague to extract a meaningful PARSED_SCOPE, the agent must STOP immediately with:
  scope_insufficient: true
  reason: '<explanation>'
Do NOT attempt drift classification when scope is insufficient.

### GATE_SIGNAL Output
The agent emits a JSON object conforming to gate-signal-schema.md:
- gate_id: 'scope_drift'
- triggered: true if out_of_scope OR ambiguous; false if in_scope
- signal_type: 'primary'
- evidence: human-readable explanation of the drift determination
- confidence: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low'
- drift_classification: (OPTIONAL extension field) one of: 'in_scope' | 'ambiguous' | 'out_of_scope'
  This additive field enables three-way classification beyond the boolean triggered field.

### Consumers Table
Reference that this agent is dispatched by /dso:fix-bug (fix-bug skill) at the scope review step.

## .test-index Update (REQUIRED)
Task B MUST update the .test-index entry created by Task A:
- BEFORE (end of Task A): plugins/dso/agents/scope-drift-reviewer.md: tests/scripts/test-scope-drift-reviewer.sh [test_scope_drift_reviewer_parsed_scope]
- AFTER (end of Task B): plugins/dso/agents/scope-drift-reviewer.md: tests/scripts/test-scope-drift-reviewer.sh

Remove the [test_scope_drift_reviewer_parsed_scope] RED marker. Failure to remove this marker blocks epic closure.

## Acceptance Criteria
- plugins/dso/agents/scope-drift-reviewer.md exists with all required sections
- All 6 tests in tests/scripts/test-scope-drift-reviewer.sh pass (except consumers_table_updated which depends on Task C)
- .test-index updated: RED marker [test_scope_drift_reviewer_parsed_scope] removed
- plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes
